notes: Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad unsettling or creepy sense for places, stories, sounds, or situations; not split into a separate gore-only or stronger terrifying branch. CEFR set editorially to B1 on 2026-04-17.

de.definition: So unheimlich oder schaurig, dass es ein unangenehmes Angstgefuehl ausloest.
de.usage_note: Typisch fuer Orte, Geschichten, Geraeusche oder Situationen mit duesterer Atmosphaere.
examples: Im dunklen Keller hoerte man ploetzlich langsame Schritte.

it.definition: Che mette a disagio o fa provare una paura sottile e strana.
it.usage_note: Tipico per luoghi, storie, rumori o situazioni con un'atmosfera cupa.
examples: Nel corridoio buio si sentivano passi lenti all'improvviso.

en.definition: Strange and unsettling in a way that makes you feel slightly frightened.
en.usage_note: Typical for places, stories, sounds, or situations with a dark atmosphere.
examples: Slow footsteps suddenly echoed through the dark hallway.
